---
name: 🚀 Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for the project
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---
# 🎁 Feature Request – Contributors Wanted! 🧑‍🚀

## 🎯 What feature would you like to see?
Describe your idea as clearly as possible.

- What should the feature do?
- Which on-chain or off-chain problem does it solve?
- Does it relate to UX, tokenomics, governance, infrastructure, or integrations?

---

## ✨ Why is this feature valuable?
Explain the impact of your idea.

- How does it improve the protocol, dApp, or ecosystem?
- Who benefits (users, validators, developers, DAO members)?
- Does it increase adoption, security, decentralization, or efficiency?

---

## 💡 Implementation ideas (optional)
If you have technical thoughts, share them here.

- Smart contract logic or architecture ideas
- Integration with standards (e.g. ERCs, Cosmos SDK modules, Substrate pallets)
- Frontend / UX suggestions
- Links to repos, proposals, or similar implementations

---

## 🗳️ Governance & alignment (optional)

- Should this go through a DAO proposal?
- Does it impact tokenomics, staking, or governance rights?
- Any risks (security, economic, regulatory)?

---

## 🙋 Want to contribute?

- [ ] I’d like to implement or co-develop this feature  
- [ ] I can help with testing or feedback  
- [ ] I have questions and need guidance  

**Skills / Stack (optional):**  
(e.g. Solidity, Rust, CosmWasm, frontend, DevOps)

---

## 🗒️ Additional context

- Screenshots / mockups  
- Related issues or discussions  
- On-chain references (contracts, transactions, proposals)
